pi_items.source: Task description explicitly instructs changing the Subject to 'Office Network Upgrade - Phase 2'
Task description explicitly instructs setting the Stage to 'Draft'
Task description explicitly instructs setting the Valid Until date to '04/15/2026', which is 2026-04-15 in ISO format
setup_task.sh explicitly inserts the original quote with the name 'Office Network Upgrade - Phase 1'
Task description explicitly instructs changing the quantity of the Cisco router to 8
Task description explicitly instructs leaving the Cisco switch quantity at 10

pi_items.metadata_value: LEGAL DISCLAIMER: This quote is subject to the Master Services Agreement v4.2 signed on 01/15/2023. Any hardware returns are subject to a 15% restocking fee. Valid only for Pinnacle Distribution Co.
pi_items.verified_value: LEGAL DISCLAIMER: This quote is subject to the Master Services Agreement v4.2 signed on 01/15/2023. Any hardware returns are subject to a 15% restocking fee. Valid only for Pinnacle Distribution Co.
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh injects these exact terms for the original quote; a duplicate should inherit them unchanged

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically injected SuiteCRM data for an account 'Pinnacle Distribution Co'. The original quote is 'Office Network Upgrade - Phase 1' and carries a specific legal disclaimer about Master Services Agreement v4.2. After duplicating, the expected new quote subject must be 'Office Network Upgrade - Phase 2', stage 'Draft', and expiration '2026-04-15'. Line item quantities are expected to be 8 for the Cisco router and 10 for the Cisco switch. The terms and conditions from the original quote should remain exactly the same.
